_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: All mouse glioma lines show full loss of Nf1 and TP53 as evidenced by the loss of the wildtype Nf1 and Tp53 alleles...these glioma cell lines express the oligodendrocyte precursor cell (OPC) markers SOX2 and NG2
details: Shows complete loss of wildtype Nf1 and Tp53 alleles and expresses OPC markers SOX2 and NG2
